display.purpose: Largest page/section title. One per screen at most.

headline.purpose: Major section headers and key stat-card figures.

title.purpose: Panel and card headings — the workhorse heading size (16px/800).

body.purpose: Default reading and data text. Prose capped at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, controls, buttons. Bold (700) to anchor dense forms.

overline.purpose: Table column headers and small eyebrows — the only place uppercase tracking is allowed.

mono.purpose: Employee codes, reference numbers, aligned currency figures.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Near-invisible seat under panels, stat cards, tables. Grounds without lifting.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Modals and dialogs — the only place a heavy shadow is correct.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Indigo focus halo on inputs and interactive elements.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Typical transition duration for hover/focus/state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one high-emphasis action per context — filled indigo.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 38px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6366f1; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.13); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default non-primary action — outlined on white.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 38px; padding: 0 13px; border: 1.5px solid #dfe5ee; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: #475569; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 180ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f8fafc; border-color: #d9e0ea; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.13); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action — outlined, not filled; weight stays quiet until pressed.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 38px; padding: 0 13px; border: 1.5px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: #dc2626; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #fee2e2; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(220,38,38,0.15); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Sturdy field — 16px font (iOS-zoom-safe), 1.5px border, indigo focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 7px; font-family: 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field > span { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #334155; } .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; font-size: 16px; font-family: inherit; color: #0f172a; background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #dfe5ee; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms, box-shadow 180ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.13); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Semantic pill — one color, one meaning. Shown here as 'Approved'.
components.html: อนุมัติ / Approved
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; min-height: 26px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-success { background: #dcfce7; color: #15803d; }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Flat surface with hairline border and near-invisible resting shadow.
components.html:
สรุปการลางาน / Leave summary

พนักงาน 12 คนมีคำขอที่รอการอนุมัติ
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e6eaf0; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.03); padding: 20px; font-family: 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-panel-header h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; } .ds-panel-action { border: 0; background: transparent; color: #4f46e5; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; } .ds-panel-body { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: #334155; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (active)
components.description: Navigation rail item in its active state — teal marks 'you are here'.
components.css: .ds-navrail { background: #0b1220; padding: 14px; border-radius: 8px; width: 240px; font-family: 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { width: 100%; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 22px 1fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 11px; min-height: 48px; padding: 8px 10px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(20,184,166,0.13); color: #fff; } .ds-nav-icon { display: grid; place-items: center; } .ds-nav-item b { min-width: 22px; height: 22px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 999px; background: #14b8a6; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: Table header (overline) + row with truncating cells and a status pill.
components.html:
พนักงานฝ่ายสถานะ
สมชาย ใจดีGLR-0142ผลิต / Productionรอตรวจ / Pending
components.css: .ds-table { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e6eaf0; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Sarabun', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-thead, .ds-trow { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0,1.6fr) minmax(0,1.2fr) minmax(0,1fr); gap: 12px; align-items: center; } .ds-thead { background: #f8fafc; border-bottom: 1px solid #e6eaf0; padding: 12px 18px; color: #64748b; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-trow { padding: 13px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; color: #334155; font-size: 13px; transition: background 180ms; } .ds-trow:hover { background: #fbfcff; } .ds-trow strong { display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; } .ds-trow small { display: block; font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; } .ds-badge-warn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 26px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: #fef3c7; color: #b45309; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview: GL-R's interface should feel like a steady operations desk: calm, organized, reliable, and built for getting real work done without confusion or decoration. Staff arrive to run payroll, reconcile attendance, approve leave and overtime, and update records — the interface's job is to make what matters legible, let them act with confidence, and get out of the way. The system is light and even, with a single dark rail to orient by: a cool off-blue workspace, white content surfaces, and a deep-navy sidebar. Density is deliberate; type is Thai-first (Sarabun) and carries real weight; color is rationed — indigo for action, teal for what is live, semantics for state.
keyCharacteristics: Light workspace, one dark navigation rail — calm, oriented, never busy.
Thai-first typography with heavy structural weights; both scripts read correctly in the same layout.
Rationed color: indigo for action/focus, teal for 'live', semantics for meaning only.
Flat-by-default surfaces; elevation is a response to intent, not decoration.
Sturdy, legible controls with real touch targets — mobile is a first-class surface.

rules.name: The Rationed Teal Rule
rules.body: Teal marks what is live and nothing else. If teal appears more than a few times on one screen, it has stopped meaning 'current' and become decoration — remove it. Indigo is for action; teal is for state; they are not interchangeable.

rules.name: The Muted Floor Rule
rules.body: #64748b (Ink Muted) is the lightest a text color may go on a white surface — it clears 4.5:1. #94a3b8 (Ink Faint) is for icons and placeholders only. Never set body or data text in Faint.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Family Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built from weight and size within Sarabun, never from a second typeface. Do not introduce a display font into UI labels, buttons, or data.

rules.name: The Both-Scripts Rule
rules.body: Every type choice must read correctly in Thai and English at the same size. No layout may depend on Latin-only metrics.

rules.name: The Flat-Desk Rule
rules.body: Content on the desk is flat. Shadow means 'this element left the desk' (modal, menu, drag). A resting card with a big soft shadow is the SaaS-dashboard tell — forbidden.

dos: Do ration color: Indigo (#4f46e5) for actions and focus, Teal (#14b8a6) for 'live'/current only, semantics for state.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest with a 1px border and the Resting shadow; reserve real shadow for modals, menus, and hover lift.
Do build hierarchy from Sarabun weight (400 body → 700 label → 800 heading), not from a second typeface.
Do keep body/data text at Ink-Muted (#64748b) or darker — it clears 4.5:1. Verify contrast on tinted surfaces.
Do keep inputs at 16px font-size and controls at ≥38–44px touch height; design mobile flows as reflowed cards, not shrunk desktop grids.
Do test every layout in both Thai and English — line-height, truncation, and label widths must survive both scripts.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion; motion (150–250ms) conveys state only.
donts: Don't use random gradients, gradient text, or gradient-drenched surfaces — this is not a startup dashboard.
Don't add excessive shadows, glassmorphism, or soft ambient shadows on resting cards.
Don't nest cards inside cards, or over-round corners — restraint is the default.
Don't set body or data text in Ink-Faint (#94a3b8) or any tiny gray low-contrast type.
Don't cram tables to spreadsheet density with everything one weight and no hierarchy; and don't ship a mobile page that's a squeezed desktop screen.
Don't scatter playful icons, decorative widgets, or over-cute empty states; and don't add unnecessary animation.
Don't spend Teal as decoration or use it interchangeably with Indigo.
Don't introduce a display or serif font into UI labels, buttons, or data.
Don't reach for a modal as the first thought — exhaust inline and progressive alternatives first.
